summary: Verified bug fix for R2 data synchronization between edit and detail views. The fix at server.py lines 11057-11064 correctly converts 'r2' to 'r2_registros' format when applying changes.

r2_data_synchronization.description: When editing R2 (area terreno) data in a predio, the detail view (eye icon) now shows the updated data correctly
r2_data_synchronization.root_cause: Frontend sends R2 data as 'r2' field, but detail view reads from 'r2_registros'. The backend was not converting the format.
r2_data_synchronization.fix_applied: Backend now converts 'r2' to 'r2_registros' format at server.py lines 11057-11064 in aplicar_cambio_predio function
r2_data_synchronization.fix_code: if 'r2' in datos: r2_data = datos['r2']; datos['r2_registros'] = [{'matricula_inmobiliaria': r2_data.get('matricula_inmobiliaria'), 'zonas': r2_data.get('zonas', [])}]; del datos['r2']

backend_api_test.result: PASSED - r2_registros correctly contains updated area_terreno

frontend_ui_test.flow: Gestión de Predios > Ábrego > View predio detail
frontend_ui_test.result: PASSED - 'Información Física (R2)' section visible with correct data
frontend_ui_test.screenshot: Detail view shows R2 section with Zona Física, Zona Económica, Área Terreno tables

backend_fix.description: Converts 'r2' field to 'r2_registros' format for consistency with detail view

frontend_edit.description: Sends R2 data as 'r2' field with zonas array

frontend_detail.description: Reads R2 data from 'r2_registros' field to display in detail view

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Bug fix correctly implemented - r2 to r2_registros conversion works
✓ Admin users can edit and save R2 data directly without approval flow
✓ Detail view correctly displays r2_registros data including zonas tables
Note: Multiple predios can have same codigo_predial_nacional (different vigencias)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing predios in Ábrego municipality
context_for_next_testing_agent: R2 bug fix verified. The fix at server.py lines 11057-11064 converts 'r2' to 'r2_registros' format when applying predio changes. Frontend sends R2 data as 'r2' field in handleUpdate, and detail view reads from 'r2_registros'. Both edit and detail views now show consistent data. Note: Multiple predios can share the same codigo_predial_nacional (different vigencias), so when testing, use predio ID for exact matching.
